commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Mattermost thread-context construction and direct send-action fallback logic so `message(action="send")` can inherit an active Mattermost thread, with regression tests around reply precedence and replyToMode behavior.

PR surface: Source +52, Tests +186. Total +238 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: combine the PR's `buildToolContext` output with current `handleSendAction`, which writes `params.replyTo` from `currentMessageId` before dispatching to Mattermost. I did not run a live Mattermost setup in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs contributor or maintainer repair plus real Mattermost proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live-environment proof gate.
